ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_symbol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price entry */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of shares traded */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted close price to account for stock splits, dividends, etc. */,
  "dividend_amount" REAL /* Dividend amount paid on the date */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio if a stock split occurred */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("stock_symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_symbols" (
  "stock_symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock symbol */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOGL) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange (e.g., NYSE, NASDAQ) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company (e.g., Technology, Healthcare) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company (e.g., Software, Pharmaceuticals) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial Public Offering date */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the stock symbol information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_indices" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the market index */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market index */,
  "base_value" REAL /* Base value of the index */,
  "base_date" TEXT /* Base date of the index */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the index information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index component */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market index */,
  "stock_symbol_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock symbol */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the stock symbol in the index */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the stock symbol became a component of the index */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the component information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_components_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_components_stock_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("stock_symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "index_values" (
  "index_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each index value entry */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market index */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the value entry */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the index */,
  "adjusted_value" REAL /* Adjusted value of the index to account for changes in components */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_values_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_index_values_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for SMS notifications */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the user information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the role information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "stock_symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol being accessed */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market index being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_stock_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("stock_symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user executing the trade */,
  "stock_symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol being traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of shares traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price per share */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission charged for the trade */,
  "order_type" TEXT /* Type of order (e.g., market, limit, stop) */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., filled, pending, canceled) */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the order */,
  "execution_time" TEXT /* Time when the trade was executed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_stock_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("stock_symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user setting the alert */,
  "stock_symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol being monitored */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market index being monitored */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value triggering the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was set */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was last triggered */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES market_indices ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("stock_symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert triggering the notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Whether the notification has been read (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the data provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data provider */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for data integration */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing the data provider's API */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the provider information */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the provider (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_integration_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration log */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data provider */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the integration activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the integration (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message describing the integration result */,
  "data_volume" TEXT /* Volume of data integrated */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken to execute the integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_integration_logs_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES data_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, data update, trade) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., moving average, volume analysis) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the report was last updated */,
  "last_run" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last run */,
  "schedule" TEXT /* Schedule for running the report (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the data point belongs to */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the data point */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES custom_reports ("report_id")
)
